analysis_commentary: min_pos 250k→350k collapsed (max=1.0, illegal=1.0) despite the larger pre-training buffer supposedly being more conservative. Grad norm fine (32) and top1_legal briefly positive. Seed variance at a nominally safer config — same story as many prior collapses. Regressed vs current best (illegal_min 0.9836, max_max 0.31, non-collapsing).
